hero.title: Build the Future with Us
hero.subheading: We're looking for passionate individuals who want to make an impact. Join our team and help us build innovative products.

values.title: A growth mindset for ambitious builders.
values.subtitle: At Crestcode USA, we push the boundaries of what's possible in core infrastructure. We provide the environment, you provide the ambition. We focus on deep work and technical mastery over bureaucracy.

values.title: Ownership
values.description: Take full responsibility for your code and impact. We empower individuals to lead projects from inception to deployment.

values.title: Excellence
values.description: We strive for nothing less than world-class quality. Our standards are high because our clients' infrastructure demands it.

values.title: Security-First
values.description: Protection is at the core of every architecture decision. We build secure by design, not as an afterthought.

talentPool.title: No current openings
talentPool.subtitle: But we are always looking for exceptional talent. Join our talent pool to be notified of new roles that match your skill set.

form.successMessage: Thanks! We'll be in touch when a role matches your profile.

cta.title: Ready to Make an Impact?
cta.subtitle: Join a team that's building the future of digital infrastructure.
